title: Baker's Oven
description: This mod introduces new kitchen tools and appliances to enhance your cooking experience beyond the crafting grids.
body:
# Baker’s Oven Mod
Baker’s Oven adds immersive cooking tools, appliances, and recipes, letting you bake, fry, churn, and craft delicious foods beyond the crafting grid.
### Requires: [Raw Milk mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/raw-milk)
## Features:
- Oven – Cooks food normally prepared in a furnace or smoker. Requires an oven mitt to remove food. No experience points are earned.
- Oven Mitt – Crafted from wool, used to safely remove food from the oven.
- Pot – Used to make soups, stews, and dairy products. Can extract cream from milk (leaving low-fat milk) or process Allium Rennet to make curds for cheese.
- Pan – Cooks eggs, pancakes (if buttered), and burgers.
- Butter Churn – Converts fresh cream into butter.
- Spatula – Used to flip and collect food.
## Added Blocks and Items:
- Blocks: Oven, Pot, Pan, Butter Churn, Cheese Block.
- Items: Oven Mitt, Spatula, Allium Rennet, Butter, Curds, Cheese, Cheeseburger.
## Recipes:
- Pancake Mix – Egg, Wheat, Milk, Sugar
- Raw Burger Patty – Raw Beef
- Cheese – Curds + Yellow Dye
- Cheese Block – Cheese x9
- Cheeseburger – Cooked Burger + Bread + Cheese
- Fried Eggs – Egg + Butter
## Crafting:
- Oven Mitt – Wool
- Spatula – Iron Nuggets
- Pan & Pot – Iron + Iron Nuggets

### Crafting Cheese
In order to craft cheese, you must brew allium rennet, by placing allium flowers in the brewing station. Add this rennet to milk in a pot, then use a sword on it to cut the curds. Collect the curds with a bucket. Craft cheese with curds and yellow dye.

This mod provides additional ways to prepare food in Minecraft while maintaining logical crafting mechanics.
